response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the conversational context described in the Reference JSON (no vocal music). 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON was used to confirm the absence of singing; manual transcription and translation were performed for the Indonesian dialogue. Burnt-in Japanese subtitles were utilized as the Primary Fallback to ensure transcription accuracy and intended meaning. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were strictly anchored to vocal starts. Applied aggressive truncation for rapid call-and-response segments and instantaneous transitions between speakers to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Iya deh, kalau Zeta udah ngomong...
subtitles.english: Alright, if Zeta has spoken...

subtitles.original: Takut ih!
subtitles.english: It's scary!

subtitles.original: Iya, iya, ya udah deh.
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, alright then.

subtitles.original: Kalau nggak boleh rebutan kamera sama Zeta...
subtitles.english: If I'm not allowed to hog the camera from Zeta...

subtitles.original: Hmm... shouganai.
subtitles.english: Hmm... it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: Kita main aja deh sama Penonton-chan!
subtitles.english: Let's just play with the fans!

subtitles.original: Kobo pengen deh coba kita teriakin penonton...
subtitles.english: I want us to try shouting at the audience...

subtitles.original: ...karena kan tadi mereka sudah teriakin kita!
subtitles.english: ...because they were shouting for us earlier!

subtitles.original: Maksudnya kita teriakan interaksi kita bareng Penonton-chan-tachi!
subtitles.english: I mean, let's do our call-and-response with the fans!

subtitles.original: Betul!
subtitles.english: Exactly!

subtitles.original: Teriaknya bareng penonton, jangan teriakin penontonnya!
subtitles.english: Shout with the audience, don't just shout at them!

subtitles.original: Iya, gitu maksudnya!
subtitles.english: Yeah, that's what I meant!

subtitles.original: Soalnya kan habis ini kita harus nyanyi, jadi kita harus simpen suara dulu nggak sih?
subtitles.english: Because we have to sing after this, so we should save our voices, right?

subtitles.original: Betul ya, nggak bakal selama itu ternyata, tenang aja...
subtitles.english: That's right, it won't take that long, don't worry...

subtitles.original: ...nggak bakal selama durasi stream Kaela gitu ya guys ya!
subtitles.english: ...it won't be as long as Kaela's streams, okay guys!

subtitles.original: Ya udah lah, mau teriak-teriak ya udah, aku nggak masalah dah, aku ngikut.
subtitles.english: Whatever, if you want to shout, fine, I don't mind, I'll join in.

subtitles.original: Aku ngikut!
subtitles.english: I'm in!

subtitles.original: Gimana nih semuanya, udah siap belum?
subtitles.english: How about it everyone, are you ready?

subtitles.original: Siap nggak?!
subtitles.english: Are you ready?!

subtitles.original: Siap nih kayaknya! Oke, Kobo dulu ya!
subtitles.english: Seems like they're ready! Okay, Kobo first!

subtitles.original: Aku mau kita sama-sama teriak...
subtitles.english: I want us to all shout together...

subtitles.original: BOKOBOKOBO!
subtitles.english: BOKOBOKOBO!

subtitles.original: Oke, siap ya?
subtitles.english: Okay, ready?

subtitles.original: Satu, dua, tiga!
subtitles.english: One, two, three!

subtitles.original: BOKOBOKOBO!
subtitles.english: BOKOBOKOBO!

subtitles.original: Suka, suka! Giliran Zeta, giliran Zeta!
subtitles.english: Nice, nice! Zeta's turn, Zeta's turn!

subtitles.original: Oke, oke, oke, oke.
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, okay, okay.

subtitles.original: Pas aku bilang "Mission Statto", kalian bareng-bareng teriak "Start!", ya?
subtitles.english: When I say "Mission Statto", you all shout "Start!" together, okay?

subtitles.original: Siap? A-a-a... Mission...
subtitles.english: Ready? A-a-a... Mission...

subtitles.original: START!
subtitles.english: START!

subtitles.original: Oke, habis ini Kaela!
subtitles.english: Okay, next is Kaela!

subtitles.original: Oke, oke, oke, oke, nah...
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, okay, okay, well...

subtitles.original: ...buat semua penonton sama Holoh3ro juga...
subtitles.english: ...to all the audience and Holoh3ro too...

subtitles.original: ...kalau misalkan aku bilang "Holoh3ro!", kalian bilang "HU-HA!", gampang kan?
subtitles.english: ...if I say "Holoh3ro!", you say "HU-HA!", easy right?

subtitles.original: Langsung, langsung, langsung!
subtitles.english: Let's go, let's go, let's go!

subtitles.original: Oke ya, siap ya? Holoh3ro!
subtitles.english: Okay, ready? Holoh3ro!

subtitles.original: HU-HA!
subtitles.english: HU-HA!

subtitles.original: Mantap, mantap, mantap!
subtitles.english: Awesome, awesome, awesome!

subtitles.original: Keren, keren, keren! Akhirnya Gen 3 kompak juga.
subtitles.english: Great, great, great! Finally, Gen 3 is in sync.

subtitles.original: Iya, kompak.
subtitles.english: Yeah, in sync.

subtitles.original: Kelihatannya masih pada semangat nih ya!
subtitles.english: Seems like everyone is still full of energy!

subtitles.original: Soalnya dari lagu pertama kita hari ini aja udah kerasa banget.
subtitles.english: Because even from our first song today, we could really feel it.

subtitles.original: Kalian tuh pada nyangka nggak sih kalau lagu pertama kita tuh bakal 100%?
subtitles.english: Did you guys expect that our first song would be 100%?

subtitles.original: Beh, mana ada yang nyangka. Aku aja sendiri nggak nyangka juga.
subtitles.english: Who would've expected it? I didn't even expect it myself.

subtitles.original: Langsung dibuka dengan Hoshinova Mode gitu, keren banget kan?
subtitles.english: Opening right away with Hoshinova Mode, it was so cool, right?

subtitles.original: Keren banget sih! Apalagi tadi Zeta sama nyanyi...
subtitles.english: It was really cool! Especially when Zeta sang...

subtitles.original: Zeta sama Kaela nyanyi "100%" tuh udah kayak real "100%" ya!
subtitles.english: When Zeta and Kaela sang "100%", it was like the real "100%"!

subtitles.original: Itu tuh bisa nggak sih... Nggak sekeren tadi, aku tuh jadi ingin kayak...
subtitles.english: Is it even possible... It was so cool that it made me want to go like...

subtitles.original: Uh, uh! Gitu kan? Kalian pernah nggak sih nyanyi lagu sekeren tadi?
subtitles.english: Uh, uh! You know? Have you ever sung a song as cool as that?

subtitles.original: Aura farming? Aura farming...
subtitles.english: Aura farming? Aura farming...

subtitles.original: Aura farming sesungguhnya! Keren banget emang lagunya Moona.
subtitles.english: Real aura farming! Moona's song really is amazing.

subtitles.original: Emang kan Zeta kan soalnya biasanya lagu-lagu yang stylish, yang jazzy-jazzy gitu.
subtitles.english: Yeah, because Zeta usually does stylish, jazzy songs.

subtitles.original: Jadi tadi pas dinyanyiin tuh ya, "100%", rasanya jadi beda banget vibes-nya.
subtitles.english: So when she sang "100%", the vibes felt completely different.

subtitles.original: Terus Kaela juga tadi ngerap ya...
subtitles.english: And then Kaela was rapping earlier too...

subtitles.original: Ta-da-da-da-da-da... Iya, pokoknya keren banget!
subtitles.english: Ta-da-da-da-da-da... Yeah, anyway, it was so cool!

subtitles.original: Keren banget ya tadi!
subtitles.english: It was really cool earlier!

subtitles.original: Tapi habis ini tuh masih ada lagi... "NEW zomBIE!" tadi.
subtitles.english: But after this, there's even more... That was "NEW zomBIE!".

subtitles.original: Ayo, pada tahu dong ini lagu siapa?
subtitles.english: Come on, you all know whose song this is, right?

subtitles.original: Taulah, taulah, senpai kita, senpai kita.
subtitles.english: Of course, of course, it's our senior's song.

subtitles.original: Tadi tuh itu ya, Holoro tuh perform-nya juga keren banget, kayak lagi di game gitu.
subtitles.english: Earlier, Holoro's performance was also really cool, like being in a game.

subtitles.original: Betul, setuju! Terus tadi ada backdancer-nya, men!
subtitles.english: True, I agree! And there were back-dancers, man!

subtitles.original: Keren ya guys! Keren nggak?!
subtitles.english: It was cool, right guys?! Wasn't it cool?!

subtitles.original: Terus ada apa lagi tuh tadi? Lampu laser, terus ada efek kembang api segala...
subtitles.english: And what else was there? Laser lights, and then fireworks effects and all...

subtitles.original: ...banyak lah ya gimik-gimik yang "wow".
subtitles.english: ...there were so many "wow" gimmicks.

subtitles.original: Itu backdancer nanti aku hire semua ya buat solo konser aku.
subtitles.english: I'm going to hire all those back-dancers for my solo concert.

subtitles.original: Wah, udah ngomong konser solo aja.
subtitles.english: Whoa, talking about a solo concert already.

subtitles.original: Ngomongan adalah doa ya. Tapi konser yang ini belum selesai.
subtitles.english: Words are prayers, you know. But this concert isn't over yet.

subtitles.original: Belum, belum, belum!
subtitles.english: Not yet, not yet, not yet!

subtitles.original: Eh, tapi... kalian tahu nggak sih sebelum ini tuh nyanyinya lagu apa?
subtitles.english: Eh, but... do you guys know what song was sung before this?

subtitles.original: Eh, aku mah tahu banget lah! Itu lagu terbaru aku... "Dahlah".
subtitles.english: Eh, I definitely know! That's my newest song... "Dahlah".

subtitles.original: Iya, dahlah, nggak usah dibahas.
subtitles.english: Yeah, forget it, let's not talk about it.

subtitles.original: Lho, kok gitu? Itu tuh maksudnya judulnya "Dahlah", lagunya judulnya "Dahlah"!
subtitles.english: Hey, why like that? I mean the title is "Dahlah", the song's title is "Dahlah"!

subtitles.original: Oh...
subtitles.english: Oh...

subtitles.original: Oh, "Dahlah"! Bilang dong!
subtitles.english: Oh, "Dahlah"! You should've said so!

subtitles.original: Habisnya kamu kan sering "dahlah, dahlah" gitu, jadi kirain emang beneran "dahlah".
subtitles.english: Because you say "dahlah, dahlah" so often, I thought you really meant it.

subtitles.original: Entar dahlah-dahlah pulang dia.
subtitles.english: Otherwise, she might just say "dahlah" and go home.

subtitles.original: Kalau gitu "Dahlah" tuh maksudnya apa sih?
subtitles.english: In that case, what does "Dahlah" actually mean?

subtitles.original: "Dahlah" sama kehidupan. Hidup tuh berat ya guys ya...
subtitles.english: "Dahlah" towards life. Life is tough, you know guys...

subtitles.original: ...kalau hidup berat ya udah "dahlah" aja, habis itu lanjutkan hidupmu!
subtitles.english: ...if life is tough, just say "dahlah", and then move on with your life!

subtitles.original: Iya betul teman-teman, di kehidupan yang dewasa ini ya.
subtitles.english: That's right everyone, in this adult life of ours.
